_doc: Test fixtures for issue-write-gate.mjs PreToolUse hook (issue #68). Each fixture is a Claude Code hook input JSON object piped to the hook on stdin. Hook contract: ALWAYS exits 0; the decision is communicated via stdout JSON {permissionDecision: 'allow'|'deny', permissionDecisionReason: <string>}. Non-zero exit indicates a hook bug. Repo state for milestone resolution is mocked via FIXTURE_MILESTONES env var. When cwd is set to /tmp/repo (a non-git path), the hook reads FIXTURE_REPO env var (defaults to 'o/r') in test mode; this lets us test repo-resolution failure by leaving the env var unset and cwd outside any git repo.

tool_input.command: gh issue create --title x --body y
gh issue create --title x --body y --milestone new
gh issue create --title x --body y --milestone new --label bug
gh issue create --title x --body y --milestone new --label Bug
gh issue create --title x --body y --milestone nonexistent --label bug

fixtures.description: MCP create with milestone number + enhancement label

tool_input.command: gh pr list
gh issue create -m new -l bug
gh issue create --milestone=new --label=bug

fixtures.description: BOTH bug AND enhancement = DENY (exactly-one rule)

tool_input.command: gh issue create --milestone new --label bug --label enhancement

fixtures.description: comma-separated label includes type + extra label

tool_input.command: gh issue create --milestone new --label bug,help-wanted
gh issue create --milestone new --label help-wanted

fixtures.description: echo "gh issue create..." = ALLOW (argv[0]=echo, not gh)

tool_input.command: echo "gh issue create --milestone new --label bug"

fixtures.description: gh api POST repos/.../issues with milestone=1

tool_input.command: gh api -X POST repos/o/r/issues -f title=x -f milestone=1 -f labels[]=bug
gh issue create --milestone DONE --label bug
gh api -XPOST repos/o/r/issues -f title=x -f milestone=1 -f labels[]=bug
gh api --method=POST repos/o/r/issues -f title=x -f milestone=1 -f labels[]=bug

fixtures.description: gh api -X GET with -f fields = ALLOW (read-only)

tool_input.command: gh api -X GET repos/o/r/issues -f milestone=1

fixtures.description: gh api with -F (field with type cast), default-POST inferred

tool_input.command: gh api -F title=x -F milestone=1 -F labels[]=bug repos/o/r/issues
gh api --method=post repos/o/r/issues -f title=x -f milestone=1 -f labels[]=bug

fixtures.description: command prefix is stripped before argv[0] check

tool_input.command: command gh issue create --milestone new --label bug

fixtures.description: variable interpolation in --milestone = DENY (cannot evaluate, fail-closed)

tool_input.command: gh issue create --milestone $MS --label bug

fixtures.description: MCP create with uppercase Bug label = DENY
MCP create with milestone number that doesn't exist in repo = DENY
repo cannot be resolved (cwd outside git, no env mock) = DENY (fail-closed)
fixtures._test_setup: this fixture must be run with FIXTURE_REPO unset AND cwd outside any git repo; bats runner sets FIXTURE_REPO_RESOLVE=fail to simulate

tool_input.command: gh issue create --milestone new --label bug
